# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "standard",
        "premium"
      ]
    },
    "objectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Azure AD objectIds (applications/service principals/users/groups) to grant secrets read/list permissions."
      }
    },
    "secrets": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of secrets to create. Each item: { \"name\": \"secretName\", \"value\": \"secretValue\", \"contentType\": \"optional\" }"
      }
    },
    "enabledForTemplateDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDeployment": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "enabledForDiskEncryption": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": false
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90,
      "minValue": 7,
      "maxValue": 90
    },
    "publicNetworkAccess": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Enabled",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Enabled",
        "Disabled"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "accessPolicies": "[array(map(parameters('objectIds'), lambda('oid', createObject('tenantId', parameters('tenantId'), 'objectId', lambdaVariables('oid'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get','list'))))))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "name": "[toUpper(parameters('skuName'))]",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "accessPolicies": "[variables('accessPolicies')]",
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForTemplateDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDeployment": "[parameters('enabledForDeployment')]",
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": "[parameters('enabledForDiskEncryption')]",
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "[parameters('publicNetworkAccess')]",
        "networkAcls": {
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('keyVaultName'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].name)]",
      "properties": {
        "value": "[parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].value]",
        "contentType": "[if(contains(parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()], 'contentType'), parameters('secrets')[copyIndex()].contentType, json('null'))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "secretsCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('secrets'))]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2023-07-01').properties.vaultUri]"
    }
  }
}
